name: pwb-widgets-monorepo
description: Monorepo workspace for managing and building multiple custom Mendix Pluggable Widgets

scripts.bump:patch:pwbDatePicker: npm version patch -w pwbDatePicker --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:pwbDatePicker
scripts.bump:minor:pwbDatePicker: npm version minor -w pwbDatePicker --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:pwbDatePicker
scripts.bump:patch:pwbComboBox: npm version patch -w pwbComboBox --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:pwbComboBox
scripts.bump:minor:pwbComboBox: npm version minor -w pwbComboBox --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:pwbComboBox
